hero.title1: There’s a difference between automating processes and having an operation that runs itself.
hero.title2: Most companies have been doing the first for years without ever reaching the second.
hero.subtitle: Automating a process is the starting point, not the destination. We take that and build the layer that turns it into a real system: automated processes that coordinate with each other, AI agents that work together with logic, traceability at every step, and synchronization across every platform you already use. We don’t sell tools. We build the system that makes your operation run without anyone having to supervise it.

lixita.title: Lixita
lixita.description: When we got to Lixita, inventory was managed across spreadsheets, emails, and collective memory. Forty hours a week, split between copying, pasting, and double-checking. We connected their systems, automated the flows, and three months later those 40 hours came back. Now they use them to sell.

solutionsHero.title2: We orchestrate your agents and AIs.
solutionsHero.body: If you already use AI tools or agents, we connect them to each other and to the rest of your operation so they work together. If you don't have them yet, we build them from scratch. Either way: everything runs in sync, no manual intervention.

MOD_01.title: AI-Powered Contract Review
MOD_01.description: Your legal team doesn't need to read every clause anymore. We built a system that cross-references contracts against current regulations, flags risks, and generates a sign-ready report.
MOD_01.videoDescription:
A litigation firm spent days prepping for each hearing. We built a system that analyzes the full case file, identifies the most likely opposing arguments, and suggests counterpoints.

The lawyer gets an actionable briefing before every hearing. They can refine it, add their own judgment, or use it as-is. The AI doesn't replace their expertise — it saves the 6 hours of prep they used to spend per case.

Built on real Colombian case law. Case data never leaves the system.

MOD_02.title: Workflow Orchestration
MOD_02.description: Got a CRM, an ERP, and three spreadsheets that don't talk to each other? We connect them so data flows between systems on its own — no one has to copy and paste.

MOD_03.title: Automated Compliance
MOD_03.description: Regulatory monitoring that never sleeps. Cross-checks your internal policies against updated regulations and alerts you before a compliance gap turns into a real problem.

MOD_04.title: Smart Document Processing
MOD_04.description: Invoices, contracts, reports — any document someone reads manually today. We structure it, classify it, and route it where it needs to go.

MOD_05.title: Agent Analytics & Monitoring
MOD_05.description: If you already have AI agents running, you need to know how they perform. Dashboards showing response times, bottlenecks, and where to optimize.

MOD_06.title: System Integration
MOD_06.description: Bi-directional connectors across your current stack — ERP, CRM, databases, internal APIs. Everything in sync, no duplicates, no transcription errors.

MOD_07.title: Sales That Move on Their Own
MOD_07.description: A system that qualifies leads, builds custom proposals, and books meetings straight into your sales team's calendar. Nobody has to lift a finger.
MOD_07.videoDescription:
The sales team was losing deals because follow-ups took days. We set up a flow that evaluates every incoming lead, drafts a proposal tailored to the prospect's profile, and books the meeting automatically.

The sales team now just shows up to close. The pipeline runs itself.

MOD_08.title: WhatsApp Customer Support
MOD_08.description: A conversational agent that handles real questions, books appointments, and updates your CRM — all inside WhatsApp, 24/7. It escalates to your human team when it needs to.
MOD_08.videoDescription:
Customers were dropping off because no one answered fast enough. We deployed a native WhatsApp agent that resolves 80% of inquiries, books appointments in the shared calendar, and updates the customer record in the CRM.

When a query gets complex, the agent escalates to the human team with the full conversation context. Zero repetition, zero frustration.

MOD_09.title: Reports Without Touching a Spreadsheet
MOD_09.description: Your weekly reports, built automatically. Pulls data from all your systems, runs the analysis, and lands in your inbox before you get to the office.
MOD_09.videoDescription:
Every Monday someone spent hours building the weekly report. Now a system pulls data from every source, runs the analysis, and generates a visual report with the metrics that matter.

It hits your inbox before 7am. Ready for decisions, no human errors, no copy-paste.

hero.title: The Future of B2B Orchestration
hero.description: Deep analysis, case studies, and reflections on how Artificial Intelligence and systems integration are redefining business growth from Colombia to the world.

art1.title: Why traditional RPA is dying against native AI?
art1.excerpt: Bots that simply repeat clicks break when the interface changes. Discover why AI Agents that 'understand' context are the only scalable way to automate in 2028.
content: For the past decade, Robotic Process Automation (RPA) was the shining star of corporate efficiency. Companies invested millions in programming bots that clicked on exact screen coordinates, copied data from specific cells, and filled out forms. It seemed like the future.

However, today's digital ecosystem is fluid and dynamic. A simple change in your CRM's user interface, an update to the billing platform, or an email with a slightly different format is enough to completely break a traditional RPA flow.

This is where Native Artificial Intelligence and B2B Orchestration by Automata Group come in. We don't program 'clicks'. We build cognitive ecosystems. Our AI Agents understand the context of the information, read documents semantically, and make real-time decisions if something in the interface changes.

This evolution transforms automation from a 'fragile process requiring constant maintenance' into a 'resilient infrastructure that learns and adapts'. It's the difference between having a vinyl record player and having a conductor orchestrating your data.

art2.title: How to orchestrate 3 different CRMs without breaking operations
art2.excerpt: When you buy a company or merge departments, unifying data is a nightmare. A case study on agnostic integration without migrating massive databases.
content: One of the biggest headaches in corporate scaling, especially during mergers or acquisitions, is information fragmentation. The original sales department uses Salesforce, the new acquisition uses HubSpot, and finance clings to an internal legacy system.

The traditional solution has always been the dreaded 'migration'. A process that can take years, cost hundreds of thousands of dollars, and almost always results in critical data loss and service interruptions.

At Automata Group, we propose a different philosophy: Don't migrate, Orchestrate. By building an intelligent middleware layer and deploying orchestrating agents, we connect the APIs of the three systems. Thus, when a lead is closed in HubSpot, the agent creates the corresponding record in Salesforce and sends the order to finance invisibly and in milliseconds.
The result is a unified company in record time, where every employee continues to use the tool they master, but data flows freely and synchronously throughout the corporation.

art3.title: The impact of AI Agents on sales talent
art3.excerpt: They are not here to replace your star salespeople, they are here to free them from manual prospecting and cold follow-ups. This is how we multiply the Sales Pipeline.
content: There is a persistent myth in the industry about Artificial Intelligence as a replacement for human work. The reality in high-value B2B environments is very different: AI is a capability multiplier.

Let's look at the day-to-day of an Account Executive. They spend 60% of their time researching prospects on LinkedIn, writing cold follow-up emails, scheduling meetings, and updating the CRM. Only 40% (or less) is dedicated to actual selling: building relationships, negotiating, and closing deals.

By integrating automated prospecting agents, we delegate research, hyper-personalized initial outreach, and calendar scheduling to the machine. The AI Agent profiles, contacts, and qualifies the lead.

When the human intervenes, it is exclusively in meetings with highly qualified prospects ready to buy. By freeing your star talent from robotic tasks, their performance and motivation skyrocket, exponentially raising the company's revenue.
